auditor: Chartered Professional Accountants, Licensed Public Accountants
economic_notes: TFN and TAA receive revenues from mining activities on N'Daki Menan through Impact Benefits Agreements. During the year, amounts earned under these agreements totaled $716,207. Assets from these agreements totaling $2.78 million are not consolidated. DMLRC operates fuelwood business, office/property rentals and forestry operations. OFNLP provides education, health, economic, cultural and community development programs.
notes: Auditor firm name not explicitly stated - North Bay, Ontario CPA firm. Consolidated entity includes TFN government, Ontario First Nation Limited Partnership (OFNLP), and Daki Menan Lands and Resources Corporation (DMLRC). Impact Benefits Agreement assets of $2.78M are excluded from consolidation as they are not controlled by TFN. Contingent loan payable of $1,000,582 to INAC contingent on land claim settlement is included in long-term debt. Land claims negotiations ongoing with unknown financial outcome. Health and social expenses combined as one line in financial statements. Net debt position of $805,874. Restricted cash of $514,125 held in debt reserve fund for FNFA loans.
